emails.subject: House of Mantra - Ceremonial Electronics Live
emails.body:
Ciao Rebecca,

Sono FLUTUR. Creo quello che chiamo 'ceremonial electronics' - sound journey che partono dal silenzio del RAV Vast e costruiscono layer su layer fino a frequenze che muovono il corpo. Dal meditativo all'estatico, live.

Ho visto House of Mantra e la vostra visione di unire yoga, meditazione e musica come esperienza trasformativa - è esattamente il mio territorio.

Background:
- Main stage Drishti Beats Festival 2023 (Aspen, Colorado) - invitato da IHF dopo opening a Denver
- 4 anni di sunset ceremonies a Villa Porta, Lago Maggiore
- RAV Vast Endorsed Artist
- Collab con Equanimous (Gravitas Recordings, 100M+ streams)

Il mio setup: RAV Vast + voce + chitarra + Ableton Push. Posso creare un arco completo - dalla meditazione al movimento - o adattarmi al momento.

-> https://youtu.be/I-lpfRHTSG4

Mi piacerebbe creare qualcosa insieme per House of Mantra.

FLUTUR
emails.notes: Target Rebecca directly - she filters submissions. Humble facilitator tone. Don't DM cold - email first, DM only if no response after 2 weeks.

emails.subject: RAV Vast Live - Opening/Cooldown/Full Journey
emails.body:
Hello,

I'm FLUTUR, a RAV Vast endorsed artist creating what I call 'ceremonial electronics' - live sound journeys that range from meditative stillness to ecstatic movement.

I'm interested in contributing to ED Berlin in any format:
- Cooldown/integration: Gentle RAV Vast sound healing (15-20 min)
- Opening warmup: Building from stillness (15-20 min)
- Full journey: Complete arc from meditation to melodic deep (45-60 min)

Background:
- Drishti Beats Festival 2023 MAIN STAGE (Colorado) - invited by IHF
- 4-year sunset ceremony residency (Villa Porta, Lake Maggiore)
- RAV Vast Endorsed Artist
- Collab with Equanimous (Gravitas, 100M+ streams)

Setup: RAV Vast + voice + guitar + Ableton Push. One-man orchestra, fully live.

-> https://youtu.be/I-lpfRHTSG4

Available for trial dates.

Best,
FLUTUR
emails.notes: They have dedicated sound healing slot at 10 PM. Pascal de Lacaze is co-founder. Offer flexibility - cooldown OR full journey.

emails.subject: RAV Vast Artist - Guest Rotation / Sound Journey
emails.body:
Hello,

I'm FLUTUR, a RAV Vast player creating 'ceremonial electronics' - live journeys from meditation to movement.

I noticed ED Rotterdam incorporates handpan in cooldown - the RAV Vast has a unique tonal quality with deeper overtones. I'd love to contribute as guest rotation or for full sound journeys.

I can offer:
- Cooldown integration (15-20 min)
- Full journey arc: stillness → build → melodic deep → integration (45-60 min)

Credentials:
- Drishti Beats Festival 2023 MAIN STAGE (invited by IHF)
- 4-year sunset ceremony residency
- RAV Vast Endorsed Artist
- Equanimous collab (Gravitas, 100M+ streams)

Setup: RAV Vast + voice + guitar + Ableton Push. Fully live, layer by layer.

-> https://youtu.be/I-lpfRHTSG4

Looking forward to connecting.

Best,
FLUTUR
emails.notes: PeTro (founder) plays handpan 12+ years. Position as complementary, not competitor. They already book handpan for cooldown.

emails.subject: Sound Journey Facilitator - RAV Vast Ceremonies
emails.body:
Hello,

I'm FLUTUR, a RAV Vast endorsed artist creating 'ceremonial electronics' - live sound journeys for meditation, yoga, and ecstatic dance.

I discovered your monthly ED and Kirtan events - the woodland sanctuary setting resonates deeply with my work. For 4 years I created sunset ceremonies for luxury hotel guests, learning to read and guide group energy.

I can offer:
- Sound journey for ED opening/cooldown
- Dedicated sound healing evening
- Yoga accompaniment with live RAV Vast + looping
- Full ceremonial arc: stillness → ecstatic → integration

Credentials:
- Drishti Beats Festival 2023 MAIN STAGE (Colorado)
- Villa Porta - 4 years sunset ceremonies
- RAV Vast Endorsed Artist
- Equanimous collab (Gravitas Recordings)

-> https://youtu.be/I-lpfRHTSG4

Would love to visit your sanctuary and create together.

Warm regards,
FLUTUR
emails.notes: Family-run woodland sanctuary. 30min Lisbon, 15min Ericeira. Monthly ED + Kirtan. Perfect for retreat-style booking.

emails.subject: Live Looping Sunset Sessions - Ceremonial Electronics
emails.body:
Hello,

I'm FLUTUR, a live looping artist creating 'ceremonial electronics' - sunset journeys from world music meditation to organic melodic deep.

Kumharas' 30-year legacy of alternative cultures and word-of-mouth discovery resonates with how I work. I create full arrangements solo, building layer by layer from RAV Vast meditation to driving rhythms.

Setup: RAV Vast (steel tongue drum) + acoustic/electric guitar + vocals + Ableton Push. One-man orchestra, adaptable 30-90 min.

Credentials:
- Drishti Beats Festival 2023 MAIN STAGE (Aspen, Colorado)
- Opening for IHF at Your Mom's House Denver (IHF played Coachella, Electric Forest, LiB)
- 4-year sunset residency (Villa Porta, Lake Maggiore)
- RAV Vast Endorsed Artist

Available summer 2026 for sunset slots.

-> https://youtu.be/I-lpfRHTSG4

Happy to call or meet off-season.

Best,
FLUTUR
emails.notes: Word-of-mouth venue. Call or visit Oct-April. They book 'all kinds of styles'. Emphasize organic/world music angle.

emails.subject: Solo Live Act - Sunset Ceremonial Electronics
emails.body:
Hello,

I'm FLUTUR, a solo live act creating what I call 'ceremonial electronics' - sunset sessions that build from meditative RAV Vast to organic melodic grooves.

I love that Sunset Ashram gives musicians artistic freedom. I create full arrangements solo - surprise, diversity, freshness through live looping. No two sets are the same.

Setup: RAV Vast + guitar + vocals + Ableton Push. Can start soft and build to dance, or stay ambient - I read the room.

Credentials:
- Drishti Beats Festival 2023 MAIN STAGE (Colorado)
- Opening for IHF (Coachella, Electric Forest artist)
- 4-year sunset ceremony residency
- RAV Vast Endorsed Artist

Available summer 2026.

-> https://youtu.be/I-lpfRHTSG4

Happy to call and discuss.

Best,
FLUTUR
emails.notes: Call +34 661 347 222 ask for music programming. They value 'surprise, diversity, freshness'. Emphasize live/unique.

emails.subject: Live World Music for Sunset Sessions
emails.body:
Hello,

I'm FLUTUR, a live musician creating 'ceremonial electronics' - organic sunset sessions from world music meditation to melodic grooves.

Nalu's Riviera sunset vibe is exactly where my music shines. I create full arrangements solo through live looping - RAV Vast, guitar, vocals, building layer by layer.

Setup: One-man orchestra. Can do ambient sunset or build to organic house energy - I adapt to the moment.

Credentials:
- Drishti Beats Festival 2023 MAIN STAGE (Aspen, Colorado)
- Opening for IHF (Coachella, Electric Forest artist)
- 4-year sunset residency (Lake Maggiore luxury hospitality)
- RAV Vast Endorsed Artist
- Equanimous collab (100M+ streams artist)

Available May-September 2026.

-> https://youtu.be/I-lpfRHTSG4

Best,
FLUTUR
emails.notes: Contact March for summer bookings. Instagram DM first, then email, then call. Organic house + world music fit.

emails.subject: Workshop + Performance Application - Ceremonial Electronics
emails.body:
Hello Evolve Team,

I'm FLUTUR, a RAV Vast endorsed artist applying to contribute to Evolve Festival 2026.

I create 'ceremonial electronics' - live journeys from sound healing meditation to ecstatic movement. My work bridges stillness and dance.

WORKSHOP PROPOSAL:
- Title: 'From Stillness to Movement: Sound Journey with RAV Vast'
- Duration: 90-120 min
- Content: Sound healing, live looping demonstration, group meditation-to-movement experience

PERFORMANCE PROPOSAL:
- Setup: RAV Vast + voice + guitar + Ableton Push
- Format: Full ceremonial arc (meditation → build → climax → integration)
- Duration: 45-60 min

Credentials:
- Drishti Beats Festival 2023 MAIN STAGE (Colorado) - invited by IHF
- 4-year sunset ceremony residency (Villa Porta)
- RAV Vast Endorsed Artist
- Equanimous collab (Gravitas, 100M+ streams)
- Greece's Got Talent - 4 YES votes

-> https://youtu.be/I-lpfRHTSG4

Looking forward to sharing with your community.

Best,
FLUTUR
emails.notes: 100% sober festival. Already has handpan workshops. Apply Sept-Nov for Aug 2026. Emphasize healing + movement bridge.

emails.subject: RAV Vast Performance + Workshop Application
emails.body:
Hello Pangonia Team,

I'm FLUTUR, a RAV Vast endorsed artist applying for Pangonia 2026.

I bring a unique angle to the handpan community: RAV Vast combined with live looping, creating full 'ceremonial electronics' compositions that bridge sound healing and modern production.

PROPOSALS:

1. PERFORMANCE (30-45 min)
   RAV Vast + voice + guitar + Ableton Push
   Full journey: meditation → melodic build → ecstatic peak → integration

2. WORKSHOP (90 min)
   'RAV Vast Looping: From Solo Instrument to Full Production'
   How to layer, build arrangements, create complete compositions

Credentials:
- RAV Vast Endorsed Artist
- Drishti Beats Festival 2023 MAIN STAGE (invited by IHF)
- 4-year sunset ceremony residency
- Equanimous collab (Gravitas, 100M+ streams)
- Greece's Got Talent - 4 YES votes

-> https://youtu.be/I-lpfRHTSG4

Excited to connect with the Pangonia community.

Best,
FLUTUR
emails.notes: July 15-19, 2026. 3 pillars: Handpan + Fire/Flow + Sauna. Position as 'diverse/colorful' and tech-forward.

emails.subject: Live Experimental Ritual - RAV Vast Ceremonial Electronics
emails.body:
Hello,

I'm FLUTUR, submitting for your experimental live music programming.

I create 'ceremonial electronics' - live ritual performances with RAV Vast, voice, guitar and Ableton Push. From sound healing meditation to organic melodic grooves, built layer by layer.

Credentials:
- Drishti Beats Festival 2023 MAIN STAGE (Colorado)
- Opening for IHF at Your Mom's House Denver (IHF: Coachella, Electric Forest, Lightning in a Bottle)
- 4-year sunset ceremony residency for luxury hospitality (Villa Porta, Lake Maggiore)
- RAV Vast Endorsed Artist
- Collab with Equanimous (Gravitas Recordings, 100M+ streams)
- Greece's Got Talent - 4 YES votes

I've seen ETNA's work with House of Mantra - the ceremonial/conscious approach resonates with my practice.

Available 2026 season.

-> https://youtu.be/I-lpfRHTSG4

Best,
FLUTUR
emails.notes: ONLY submit after building momentum elsewhere. ETNA is resident - mention House of Mantra connection if you have it. Use official booking form.
